title: Fleet Performance Dashboard

sql.statement: SELECT count(*) AS value FROM raw_business_data.objects WHERE is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(track_distance_meters), 0) / 1000.0, 2) AS value FROM business_data.tracks WHERE track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'

WITH last_message AS (SELECT device_id, MAX(device_time) AS last_device_time FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core WHERE event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) GROUP BY device_id) SELECT count(*) AS value FROM raw_business_data.objects o LEFT JOIN last_message lm ON lm.device_id = o.device_id WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE AND lm.last_device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

WITH params AS (SELECT CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' AS date_from, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS date_to, 120 AS speed_limit_kmh), core_speed AS (SELECT c.device_id, c.speed / 100.0 AS speed_kmh, COALESCE(v.max_speed, p.speed_limit_kmh) AS limit_kmh FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = c.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v ON v.object_id = o.object_id CROSS JOIN params p WHERE c.device_time >= p.date_from AND c.device_time <= p.date_to AND c.speed IS NOT NULL AND c.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND c.latitude <> 0 AND c.longitude <> 0) SELECT count(*) AS value FROM core_speed WHERE speed_kmh > limit_kmh

WITH last_message AS (SELECT device_id, MAX(device_time) AS last_device_time FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core WHERE event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) GROUP BY device_id), classified AS (SELECT CASE WHEN lm.last_device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' THEN 'Active' ELSE 'Inactive' END AS status FROM raw_business_data.objects o LEFT JOIN last_message lm ON lm.device_id = o.device_id WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE) SELECT status AS category, count(*) AS value FROM classified GROUP BY status ORDER BY status

SELECT COALESCE(o.object_label, 'device_' || t.device_id) AS category, ROUND(SUM(t.track_distance_meters) / 1000.0, 2) AS value FROM business_data.tracks t JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = t.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY o.object_label, t.device_id ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT COALESCE(o.object_label, 'device_' || c.device_id) AS category, count(*) AS value FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = c.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v ON v.object_id = o.object_id WHERE c.device_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' AND c.speed IS NOT NULL AND c.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND c.latitude <> 0 AND c.longitude <> 0 AND c.speed / 100.0 > COALESCE(v.max_speed, 120) GROUP BY o.object_label, c.device_id ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

WITH last_message AS (SELECT device_id, MAX(device_time) AS last_seen FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core WHERE event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) GROUP BY device_id), mileage AS (SELECT device_id, ROUND(SUM(track_distance_meters) / 1000.0, 2) AS km_30d, count(*) AS trips_30d FROM business_data.tracks WHERE track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY device_id) SELECT o.object_label AS vehicle, COALESCE(v.registration_number, '—') AS reg_number, COALESCE(v.model, '—') AS model, CASE WHEN lm.last_seen >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' THEN 'active' WHEN lm.last_seen IS NULL THEN 'no data' ELSE 'inactive' END AS status, COALESCE(mi.km_30d, 0) AS km_30d, COALESCE(mi.trips_30d, 0) AS trips_30d, to_char(lm.last_seen, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS last_seen FROM raw_business_data.objects o LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v ON v.object_id = o.object_id LEFT JOIN last_message lm ON lm.device_id = o.device_id LEFT JOIN mileage mi ON mi.device_id = o.device_id WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE ORDER BY o.object_label NULLS LAST LIMIT 500
SELECT count(*) AS value FROM raw_business_data.employees WHERE is_deleted IS NOT TRUE

WITH active_devices AS (SELECT DISTINCT device_id FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core WHERE device_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' AND event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811)) SELECT count(DISTINCT e.employee_id) AS value FROM raw_business_data.employees e JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.object_id = e.object_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE JOIN active_devices ad ON ad.device_id = o.device_id WHERE e.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE

WITH driver_mileage AS (SELECT e.employee_id, SUM(t.track_distance_meters) AS total_meters FROM raw_business_data.employees e JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.object_id = e.object_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE JOIN business_data.tracks t ON t.device_id = o.device_id WHERE e.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE AND t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY e.employee_id) SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(total_meters), 0) / 1000.0, 2) AS value FROM driver_mileage

SELECT count(DISTINCT e.employee_id) AS value FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = c.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE JOIN raw_business_data.employees e ON e.object_id = o.object_id AND e.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v ON v.object_id = o.object_id WHERE c.device_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' AND c.speed IS NOT NULL AND c.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND c.latitude <> 0 AND c.longitude <> 0 AND c.speed / 100.0 > COALESCE(v.max_speed, 120)

SELECT COALESCE(e.first_name || ' ' || e.last_name, 'Unassigned') AS category, count(*) AS value FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = c.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v ON v.object_id = o.object_id LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.employees e ON e.object_id = o.object_id AND e.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE WHERE c.device_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' AND c.speed IS NOT NULL AND c.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND c.latitude <> 0 AND c.longitude <> 0 AND c.speed / 100.0 > COALESCE(v.max_speed, 120) GROUP BY e.first_name, e.last_name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT COALESCE(e.first_name || ' ' || e.last_name, 'Unassigned') AS category, ROUND(SUM(t.track_distance_meters) / 1000.0, 2) AS value FROM business_data.tracks t JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = t.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.employees e ON e.object_id = o.object_id AND e.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY e.first_name, e.last_name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT COALESCE(e.first_name || ' ' || e.last_name, 'Unassigned') AS driver, COALESCE(e.personnel_number, '—') AS personnel_number, count(t.track_id) AS trips, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(t.track_distance_meters), 0) / 1000.0, 2) AS km_total, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(t.track_distance_meters), 0) / 1000.0, 2) AS km_avg_per_trip, to_char(MAX(t.track_start_time), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS last_trip FROM raw_business_data.employees e JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.object_id = e.object_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE LEFT JOIN business_data.tracks t ON t.device_id = o.device_id AND t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' WHERE e.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE GROUP BY e.employee_id, e.first_name, e.last_name, e.personnel_number ORDER BY km_total DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT count(*) AS value FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = c.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v ON v.object_id = o.object_id WHERE c.device_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' AND c.speed IS NOT NULL AND c.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND c.latitude <> 0 AND c.longitude <> 0 AND c.speed / 100.0 > COALESCE(v.max_speed, 120)

SELECT count(*) AS value FROM business_data.tracks t JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = t.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' AND (EXTRACT(HOUR FROM t.track_start_time) >= 22 OR EXTRACT(HOUR FROM t.track_start_time) < 6 OR EXTRACT(HOUR FROM t.track_end_time) >= 22 OR EXTRACT(HOUR FROM t.track_end_time) < 6)

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(c.speed / 100.0), 0)::numeric, 2) AS value FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = c.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v ON v.object_id = o.object_id WHERE c.device_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' AND c.speed IS NOT NULL AND c.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND c.latitude <> 0 AND c.longitude <> 0 AND c.speed / 100.0 > COALESCE(v.max_speed, 120)

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(MAX(c.speed / 100.0), 0)::numeric, 2) AS value FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = c.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE WHERE c.device_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' AND c.speed IS NOT NULL AND c.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND c.latitude <> 0 AND c.longitude <> 0

SELECT 'Speeding' AS category, count(*) AS value FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = c.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v ON v.object_id = o.object_id WHERE c.device_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' AND c.speed IS NOT NULL AND c.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND c.latitude <> 0 AND c.longitude <> 0 AND c.speed / 100.0 > COALESCE(v.max_speed, 120) UNION ALL SELECT 'Night Driving' AS category, count(*) AS value FROM business_data.tracks t JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = t.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' AND (EXTRACT(HOUR FROM t.track_start_time) >= 22 OR EXTRACT(HOUR FROM t.track_start_time) < 6 OR EXTRACT(HOUR FROM t.track_end_time) >= 22 OR EXTRACT(HOUR FROM t.track_end_time) < 6)

panels.title: Speeding Violations by Hour of Day 30d

sql.statement: SELECT lpad(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM c.device_time)::int::text, 2, '0') || ':00' AS category, count(*) AS value FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = c.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v ON v.object_id = o.object_id WHERE c.device_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' AND c.speed IS NOT NULL AND c.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND c.latitude <> 0 AND c.longitude <> 0 AND c.speed / 100.0 > COALESCE(v.max_speed, 120) GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM c.device_time)::int ORDER BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM c.device_time)::int

SELECT o.object_label AS vehicle, COALESCE(e.first_name || ' ' || e.last_name, 'Unassigned') AS driver, to_char(c.device_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS violation_time, ROUND((c.latitude / 1e7)::numeric, 6) AS latitude, ROUND((c.longitude / 1e7)::numeric, 6) AS longitude, ROUND((c.speed / 100.0)::numeric, 2) AS speed_kmh, ROUND(COALESCE(v.max_speed, 120)::numeric, 2) AS limit_kmh, ROUND((c.speed / 100.0 - COALESCE(v.max_speed, 120))::numeric, 2) AS excess_kmh FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core c JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = c.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v ON v.object_id = o.object_id LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.employees e ON e.object_id = o.object_id AND e.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE WHERE c.device_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' AND c.speed IS NOT NULL AND c.event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND c.latitude <> 0 AND c.longitude <> 0 AND c.speed / 100.0 > COALESCE(v.max_speed, 120) ORDER BY c.device_time DESC LIMIT 500
SELECT count(*) AS value FROM business_data.zone_visits WHERE enter_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
SELECT count(DISTINCT zone_id) AS value FROM business_data.zone_visits WHERE enter_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'

SELECT ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM duration) / 60.0), 0)::numeric, 2) AS value FROM business_data.zone_visits WHERE enter_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' AND exit_time IS NOT NULL AND duration IS NOT NULL

SELECT count(DISTINCT zv.device_id) AS value FROM business_data.zone_visits zv JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = zv.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE WHERE zv.enter_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'

SELECT COALESCE(z.zone_label, 'Zone ' || zv.zone_id) AS category, count(*) AS value FROM business_data.zone_visits zv LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.zones z ON z.zone_id = zv.zone_id WHERE zv.enter_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY z.zone_label, zv.zone_id ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT COALESCE(o.object_label, 'device_' || zv.device_id) AS category, count(*) AS value FROM business_data.zone_visits zv JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = zv.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE WHERE zv.enter_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY o.object_label, zv.device_id ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT COALESCE(o.object_label, 'device_' || zv.device_id) AS vehicle, COALESCE(z.zone_label, 'Zone ' || zv.zone_id) AS zone, CASE WHEN zv.exit_time IS NULL THEN 'active' ELSE 'completed' END AS status, to_char(zv.enter_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS enter_time, to_char(zv.exit_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS exit_time, ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM zv.duration) / 60.0, 2) AS duration_min FROM business_data.zone_visits zv JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = zv.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.zones z ON z.zone_id = zv.zone_id WHERE zv.enter_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY zv.enter_time DESC LIMIT 500

description: Fleet Performance Dashboard – Block 1: Fleet Overview
